title: cerinthe minor subsp. minor
intro: Cerinthe minor subsp. minor, also known as the small blue thistle or honey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cerinthe minor subsp. minor include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds and flu.
